jtwc.title: Tropical Storm 05E (Elida) Warning #11
jtwc.text:
WTPN31 PHNC 171000
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/TROPICAL STORM 05E (ELIDA) WARNING NR 011//
RMKS/
